title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain, founder of Glean, discusses his philosophy for building successful AI companies. He argues that strategic focus and avoiding redundant competition matter more than scaling model size or polish, and emphasizes "Build Less, Win More" as his principle for enterprise AI.
